ogTitle: Wattle Grove vs Wattleup: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Wattle Grove and Wattleup.
heading: Wattle Grove vs Wattleup — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wattle Grove, Western Australia and Wattleup, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wattleup has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Wattle Grove (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wattle Grove or Wattleup safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wattle Grove has a flood risk score of 57/100, while Wattleup scores 32/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wattle Grove scores 52/100 for bushfire risk. Wattleup scores 65/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wattle Grove or Wattleup?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wattleup has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.25% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
